metadata.description: Claude agent skills for Blender headless automation — 3D modeling, mesh repair, export, rendering, compositing, and image editing

plugins.name: blender-headless
plugins.description: Set up and run Blender in headless/background mode from Python scripts. Use when writing any Blender automation script, needing CLI invocation patterns, parsing sys.argv, bootstrapping a factory scene, or understanding bpy namespace basics (bpy.data, bpy.ops, bpy.context, bpy.app.handlers).

plugins.name: blender-mesh-modeling
plugins.description: Create and edit 3D meshes programmatically in Blender using from_pydata and BMesh APIs. Use when generating procedural geometry, editing topology without a GUI, extruding faces, translating vertices, or building mesh datablocks from Python data.

plugins.name: blender-modifiers
plugins.description: Add and configure non-destructive Blender modifiers (Boolean, Remesh, Decimate, Solidify) and bake the modifier stack to a final mesh via depsgraph. Use when applying boolean operations, voxel remeshing, polygon reduction, or shell thickness without destructive edits.

plugins.name: blender-mesh-repair
plugins.description: Repair 3D meshes for watertight/manifold geometry using Blender's BMesh API. Use when fixing non-manifold geometry, welding duplicate vertices, filling open holes, recalculating normals, or validating a mesh before 3D-print export.

plugins.name: blender-3d-export
plugins.description: Export Blender meshes to STL, OBJ, 3MF, or AMF with version-safe operator calls. Use when exporting 3D models for printing or interchange, handling Blender 3.x/4.x API differences, batch-exporting selected objects, or writing add-on-dependent export fallbacks.

plugins.name: blender-rendering
plugins.description: Set up cameras, lights, and render a Blender scene to PNG/JPEG/EXR from a headless script. Use when rendering stills or animations, configuring EEVEE or Cycles engines, adjusting resolution and output format, or scripting multi-angle batch renders.

plugins.name: blender-compositing
plugins.description: Build Blender compositor node trees for post-processing effects (blur, rotate, translate, scale, alpha-over) and file output. Use when applying post-render effects, compositing overlays, saving via file-output nodes, or handling version differences in compositor node APIs.

plugins.name: blender-image-editing
plugins.description: Load, create, resize, pixel-edit, and save images via Blender's image datablock API without rendering a 3D scene. Use when batch-processing image files, manipulating pixel buffers, resizing textures, saving with format settings, or chaining render-complete handlers for multi-shot sequences.
